message:
✨ Add Copilot PR automation workflow

Automates Copilot PR handling without requiring approval:
- Override DCO status for Copilot commits
- Fix DCO labels (remove no, add yes)
- Fix title (remove [WIP], add emoji prefix)
- Mark PR as ready for review (remove draft status)
- Remove do-not-merge/work-in-progress label

Uses pull_request_target to avoid approval requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
